title: Atelier egress audit log
description: One record per remote-model call. Exportable for privacy review. Shares the on-disk `audit.log` with subprocess-egress and MCP-egress rows; discriminated by `kind`.

kind.description: Discriminator. Distinct from `subprocess-egress` and `mcp-http-request` rows sharing the same `audit.log`.

provider.description: Lowercase provider name. v60.36 H5/L7 — capped + pattern-constrained to match the `mcp_egress.v1.json::provider` shape so audit-log queries can rely on a uniform field across model-call and mcp-http-request rows.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the post-redaction payload sent

redaction_policy_id.description: Pointer to the redaction config in effect at call time

pattern.description: Redaction pattern (regex or literal). Capped at 512 bytes so a misbehaving producer can't bloat the audit log with multi-megabyte patterns (also bounds the ReDoS surface a downstream consumer would face).
